title: WHITE HILL Elf Wooden Swing With PDQ - Christmas Festive Tree Holiday Decoration - Decorative Xmas Hanging Ornament
features: FESTIVE DECOR – The Elf Wooden Swing can be hung on a tree or on the wall, enrich festive decoration at your house. It will add atmosphere to your warm Christmas, accompany you spend a happy and unforgettable festival.
GOOD QUALITY - Each piece is made of high-quality Wood with polyester string. The fine handworks make them durable and strong.
CHRISTMAS SWING - It can be easily assembled and placed anywhere to enhance the Christmas atmosphere.
CHRISTMAS ORNAMENTS: Our mini swing decorations are amazing ornaments that your kids can use to decorate their own tree!
CHRISTMAS PARTY DÉCOR: The swing will make a perfect christmas decoration for your home, offices, shopping mall, bar, school, kitchens, children's rooms, and even gardens.
description: Product Description WHERE YOU HANG IT, WHERE YOU CAN BRING HAPPINESS You can hang the swing on a sturdy tree branch or a frame inside your garage. Whether backyard, porch, patio, garden, park, or home can be your children's playground. Let your kids enjoy childhood with the whole family. Attractive traditional pine wood swing seat which is fully treated with a child friendly preservative to ensure a long life in the garden. Perfect for use on a garden climbing frame. Swing seat made from hemp for supreme strength and resilience against weather damage. GOOD QUALITY This swing is made up of good quality. Solid And Strong Swing. Each piece is made of high-quality Wood with polyester string. The fine handworks make them durable and strong. Wooden Garden Swing Seat. Outdoor Pine Wood Swing Chair. Strong Hanging Rope. SIMPLE SWING ASSEMBLY The tree rope swing kit includes everything you need for quick and easy assembly. Just follow our simple, step-by-step instructions and your garden swing will be set up. Step 1, choose the branches of a sturdy hardwood tree, pay attention that avoiding fruit trees, evergreens, or trees that split easily. Step 2, tie the rope or the straps in the hanging kit around the tree branch and adjust to your desired angle. Such great fun for your kids. Strong And Sturdy Wooden Material Attractive Christmas Theme Red Color Beech wooden material provides you with security and comfort using experience. The wood tree swing with 180cm adjustable rope galvanized metal ring and accessories, easily be hung on the branch or beam. The sturdy twine can stand up to 220lbs. High-quality materials allow this swing to withstand the sunshine and wind even snow while maintaining its luster. Red wooden swing with red and white striped string Festive Tree Holiday Decoration Durable wood construction Supplied with a display box Hanging Ornament Your elf will be sitting in style with this delightful wooden Swing. This Elf Wooden Swing is the perfect accessory for naughty elves and features a durable wood construction with an attached rope for hanging. These cute little swings are not just usual Christmas tree decoration but are an elegant addition to your Christmas décor. The luxury ornaments are made of Wood & polyester material to provide an excellent durability. You can easily hang it on a Christmas Tree, Door, Wall, Bedside, Near the Fireplace or anywhere that you want to décor. This product is supplied with a display box.
